zh.lifeSummary: 當Jean Atholia於1354年出生在英國蘇格蘭時，她的父親Robert de Atholia 6th Of Glenerochie24歲，母親Joan Striveling de Atholia14歲。她於1375年與Alexander Menzies of Fortingall在英國蘇格蘭培爾福迪加爾結婚。他們至少是2個兒子和1個女兒的父母。她去世在蘇格蘭培爾福迪加爾。

zh-hans.lifeSummary: 当Jean Atholia于1354年出生在英国苏格兰时，她的父亲Robert de Atholia 6th Of Glenerochie24岁，母亲Joan Striveling de Atholia14岁。她于1375年与Alexander Menzies of Fortingall在英国苏格兰培爾福迪加爾结婚。他们至少是2个儿子和1个女儿的父母。她去世在苏格兰培爾福迪加爾。

nameMeanings.name: Jean
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of First Names © Patrick Hanks and Flavia Hodges 1990, 2003, 2006.
meanings: Like Jane and Joan , a medieval variant of Old French Je(h)anne. Towards the end of the Middle Ages this form became largely confined to Scotland. In the 20th century it became more widely used in the English-speaking world and enjoyed a period of great popularity, but it is now out of fashion. Among numerous well-known and influential bearers are the British novelists Jean Plaidy ( Eleanor Hibbert , 1910–93 ) and Jean Rhys ( Ella Gwendolen Rees Williams , 1894–1979 ), British actress Jean Simmons ( 1929–2010 ), and American-born actress Jean Seberg ( 1938–79 ). It is also found as a variant spelling of the masculine name Gene .

en.lifeSummary: When Jean Atholia was born in 1354, in Scotland, United Kingdom, her father, Robert de Atholia 6th Of Glenerochie, was 24 and her mother, Joan Striveling de Atholia, was 14. She married Alexander Menzies of Fortingall in 1375, in Fortingall, Perthshire, Scotland, United Kingdom. They were the parents of at least 2 sons and 1 daughter. She died in Fortingall, Perthshire, Scotland.

fr.lifeSummary: Lorsque Jean Atholia est née en 1354, à Écosse, Royaume-Uni, son père, Robert de Atholia 6th Of Glenerochie, avait 24 ans et sa mère, Joan Striveling de Atholia, avait 14 ans. Elle a épousé Alexander Menzies of Fortingall en 1375, à Fortingall, Perthshire, Écosse, Royaume-Uni. Ils ont eu au moins 2 fils et 1 fille. Elle est décédée à Fortingall, Perthshire, Écosse.

de.lifeSummary: Als Jean Atholia 1354 in Schottland, United Kingdom geboren wurde, war ihr Vater Robert de Atholia 6th Of Glenerochie 24 und ihre Mutter Joan Striveling de Atholia 14. Sie hat 1375 in Fortingall, Perthshire, Schottland, United Kingdom Alexander Menzies of Fortingall geheiratet. Sie hatten mindestens 2 Söhne und 1 Tochter. Sie starb in Fortingall, Perthshire, Scotland.

it.lifeSummary: Quando Jean Atholia è nata il nel 1354 nel Scozia, Regno Unito, sua padre, Robert de Atholia 6th Of Glenerochie, aveva 24 anni e sua madre, Joan Striveling de Atholia, aveva 14 anni. Lei sposato Alexander Menzies of Fortingall nel 1375, nel Fortingall, Perthshire, Scozia, Regno Unito. Erano genitori di almeno 2 figli e 1 figlia. Morì nel Fortingall, Perthshire, Scotland.

ja.lifeSummary: Jean Atholiaが1354年にイギリススコットランドで生まれた時，父Robert de Atholia 6th Of Glenerochieは24歳，母Joan Striveling de Atholiaは14歳であった。1375年にイギリススコットランドペルスシュアイアフォーティンガルでAlexander Menzies of Fortingallと結婚した。彼らは少なくとも2人の息子と1人の娘の親であった。彼女はスコットランドペルスシュアイアフォーティンガルで死去した。

ko.lifeSummary: Jean Atholia(이)가 1354년 영국 스코틀랜드에서 태어났을 때, 그녀의 아버지 Robert de Atholia 6th Of Glenerochie(은)는 24세였고, 그녀의 어머니 Joan Striveling de Atholia(은)는 14세였다. 그녀는 1375년 영국 스코틀랜드 퍼스실르 포틴갤에서 Alexander Menzies of Fortingall(와)과 결혼했다. 그들은 적어도 두 명의 아들과 한 명의 딸을 두었다. 그녀는 스컷랜드 퍼스실르 포틴갤에서 사망했다.

pt.lifeSummary: Quando Jean Atholia nasceu em 1354, em Escócia, United Kingdom, seu pai, Robert de Atholia 6th Of Glenerochie, tinha 24 anos e sua mãe, Joan Striveling de Atholia, tinha 14 anos. Ela casou-se com Alexander Menzies of Fortingall em 1375, em Fortingall, Perthshire, Escócia, United Kingdom. Eles tiveram pelo menos 2 filhos e 1 filha. Ela faleceu em Fortingall, Perthshire, Scotland.

ru.lifeSummary: Когда Jean Atholia родилась в 1354 г. в местности Шотландия, Великобритания, её отцу по имени Robert de Atholia 6th Of Glenerochie было 24 года, а матери, которую звали Joan Striveling de Atholia, 14. Она вышла замуж за человека по имени Alexander Menzies of Fortingall в 1375 г. в местности фортингалл, пиртшир, Шотландия, Великобритания. У них было по крайней мере 2 сына и 1 дочь. Она умерла в местности фортингалл, пиртшир, Шотландия.

es.lifeSummary: Cuando Jean Atholia nació en 1354, en Escocia, Reino Unido, su papá, Robert de Atholia 6th Of Glenerochie, tenía 24 años y su mamá, Joan Striveling de Atholia, tenía 14 años. Se casó con Alexander Menzies of Fortingall en 1375, en Fortingall, Perthshire, Escocia, Reino Unido. Fueron padres de por lo menos 2 hijos y 1 hija. Murió en Fortingall, Perthshire, Scotland.
